landing.heroSubtitle: Connecting clients with verified engineering professionals to move projects forward with confidence.
landing.heroHeadline: Engineering services, clearly sourced and professionally delivered.
landing.heroLegacySubtitle: Submit your project requirements, receive quotations from engineering providers, compare offers, sign the agreement, and manage delivery in one place.
heroTrustPoints: Standardized engineering services across 147 catalog entries
Structured quotation comparison for every request
Secure project records, agreements, and delivery history
Built for the Saudi engineering market in English and Arabic

catalog.title: Standardized scope
catalog.description: 147 engineering services with clear requirements and deliverables.

quotes.title: Comparable quotations
quotes.description: Providers submit their own pricing — you compare structured offers.

tracking.title: Simple execution
tracking.description: Green, amber, and red milestones without complex reporting.

bilingual.title: Saudi-ready platform
bilingual.description: English and Arabic with full RTL support across the experience.

landing.workflowDescription: Four clear stages from request to archive. Expand any stage to see the detailed steps.

submit.title: Submit
submit.summary: Select the project location, services, and requirements.

compare.title: Compare
compare.summary: Receive and compare structured agency quotations.

execute.title: Agree & Execute
execute.summary: Sign the agreement and follow simple milestones.

complete.title: Complete
complete.summary: Confirm payment, close the project, and archive records.

landing.catalogTitle: Find the engineering service you need
landing.catalogSubtitle: Search the catalog or browse main categories — then explore all 147 services.
landing.catalogSearchPlaceholder: What engineering service do you need?

catalogCategoryDescriptions.Design: Architectural, structural, and interior design for new and existing buildings.
catalogCategoryDescriptions.Permits & Licensing: Building permits, licensing, and regulatory submissions.
catalogCategoryDescriptions.Surveying & Land: Land surveys, boundary reports, and site measurements.
catalogCategoryDescriptions.Supervision & Project Management: Construction supervision and project coordination on site.
catalogCategoryDescriptions.Inspections & Technical Reports: Technical inspections, safety reports, and compliance reviews.
catalogCategoryDescriptions.Engineering Studies: Feasibility, environmental, and specialized engineering studies.

landing.packagesSubtitle: Curated service groups for common client needs — providers still submit their own quotations.

build-my-villa.forWho: For homeowners building a new villa
build-my-villa.problem: Everything needed to move from design to completion.

design-to-permit.forWho: For projects ready to reach permit approval
design-to-permit.problem: Complete the design and prepare for permit approval.

renovate-&-expand.forWho: For property owners modifying existing buildings
renovate-&-expand.problem: Modify or expand an existing property correctly.

legalize-my-building.problem: Resolve building compliance and permit issues.

clientBenefits.title: Move your project forward with clarity
clientBenefits.description: One structured request, comparable quotations, and a single place to manage delivery.
items: Understand which engineering service your project requires
Submit one structured request instead of scattered outreach
Receive comparable quotations from engineering providers
Choose the right provider with scope and terms side by side
Keep agreements, files, and project records in one place
Follow progress with simple milestone status — no complex reports

providerBenefits.title: Win relevant work and deliver professionally
providerBenefits.description: Engineering offices and individual engineers use the same provider account flow.
items: Receive relevant project opportunities matched to your services
Submit professional quotations with scope and deliverables
Manage active projects and milestone updates in one portal
Upload deliverables and keep client records organized
Track payment status recorded on the platform
Manage invoices and basic financial activity

landing.agenciesDescription: Browse engineering offices on ENGA. Registration and profile completion are required before providers can receive requests.
landing.agenciesEmpty: Registered providers will appear here as they join the platform.
landing.agenciesEmptyHint: Engineering offices can register now and complete their profile to start receiving requests.
landing.getStartedTitle: Ready to move your engineering project forward?
landing.getStartedDescription: Submit your requirements and start receiving quotations from engineering providers.

footer.description: ENGA connects clients with engineering providers and manages the commercial process from request to archive.
footer.tagline: Structured engineering procurement · Built for Saudi Arabia

auth.shellTitle: Request, quote, deliver, and pay — in one trusted platform.
auth.shellSubtitle: Built for Saudi Arabia's engineering services ecosystem with verified offices and structured workflows.
auth.accountCreatedMessage: Account created! Check your email and click the confirmation link, then sign in.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox (and spam folder), then try signing in again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. If you just signed up, confirm your email first or use the exact password from signup.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.engineerUnavailable: Individual engineer registration is not available at this time.
errors.authUnavailable: Authentication service is unavailable. Please try again later.

projectWorkspace.closeHint: Complete when all milestones are green and payment is confirmed.

quotationsPage.acceptConfirm: Accept this quotation and generate agreement?
quotationsPage.floating: Your request is floating. Agencies are reviewing it — check back soon.

adminPage.manageAgencies: Manage all engineering offices on the platform
adminPage.description: Monitor platform activity. New office and engineer registrations activate automatically; use moderation tools for legacy pending records or post-registration review.
adminPage.legacyPendingDesc: Registrations submitted before auto-activation may still appear here.

quotationsListPage.description: Requests with quotations from engineering offices
quotationsListPage.noOpenQuotations: No open quotations yet. Float a request to receive quotes.

requestsPage.description: View and manage all your project requests in one place.

dashboard.subtitle: Compare quotations, review scope, and select the right delivery partner.

dashboard.noQuotations: No quotations yet. Float a project request to receive offers from licensed offices.

requestForm.pageDescription: Define your project requirements to receive quotations from engineering offices.

requestForm.errorAgencies: Select at least one agency to invite.
